name: Clara's Day Dive
tagline: Dive in for a day drink.
description: A neighborhood coupe bar with cold drinks, good shade, and a rotating cast of food trucks. Sun's out, penguins in.

seo.title: Clara's Day Dive — East Austin Coupe Bar & Patio
seo.description: Dive in for a day drink at Clara's Day Dive — an East Austin coupe bar and patio with spritzes, frozen cocktails, food trucks, morning coffee, and live events.
seo.longDescription: Clara's Day Dive is an East Austin coupe bar and patio at 1814 E Cesar Chavez St. We pour day drinks, Aperol spritzes, frozen frosé, and zero-proof Penguin Punch on a dog-friendly patio with rotating food trucks and morning coffee. Open afternoons through late night.

contact.responseTime: We typically reply within a day.

responses.Something pink & frozen: Try the Penguin Punch — frozen, very pink, zero-proof. Or a Frosé if you want the buzz.
responses.Low-ABV spritz: Clara's Spritz: Aperol, prosecco, a twist of grapefruit. Sessionable all afternoon.
responses.What's on the patio?: Shade, string lights, dog bowls, and Bird Bird Biscuit til 2. Open till midnight.

search.fallback: Clara says: come on in — we'll pour you something good.
